title: Duplicate row output on an OR query
poc:
select * from t where
  c0=1 or  c1=1 or  c2=1 or  c3=1 or
  c4=1 or  c5=1 or  c6=1 or  c7=1 or
  c8=1 or  c9=1 or c10=1 or c11=1 or
  c12=1 or c13=1 or c14=1 or c15=1 or
  c16=1 or c17=1;
key_bug_features: OR query returning duplicate rows in results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(c0 INTEGER, c1 TEXT, c2 REAL, c3 BLOB, c4 INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, c5 INTEGER UNIQUE, c6 TEXT CHECK(c6 IN ('A', 'B', 'C')), c7 INTEGER, c8 INTEGER, c9 INTEGER, c10 INTEGER, c11 INTEGER, c12 INTEGER, c13 INTEGER, c14 INTEGER, c15 INTEGER, c16 INTEGER, c17 INTEGER);
INSERT INTO t(c0, c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6) VALUES (1, 'row1', 1.5, X'001122', 0, 2, 'A');
INSERT INTO t(c0, c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6) VALUES (1, 'row2', 2.5, X'334455', 0, 3, 'B');
SELECT * FROM t WHERE c0=1 OR c1='row1' OR c2=1.5 OR c3 IS NOT NULL OR c4=0 OR c5=2 OR c6='A' OR c7=1 OR c8=1 OR c9=1 OR c10=1 OR c11=1 OR c12=1 OR c13=1 OR c14=1 OR c15=1 OR c16=1 OR c17=1;
SELECT * FROM t WHERE c0=1 OR c1 IS NULL OR c2=2.5 OR c3 IS NULL OR c4=0 OR c5 IS NULL OR c6='C' OR c7=1 OR c8=1 OR c9=1 OR c10=1 OR c11=1 OR c12=1 OR c13=1 OR c14=1 OR c15=1 OR c16=1 OR c17=1;
